---

### Layer C — Schema & State Machine
**[lattice-schema.ts](sandbox:///mnt/agents/output/lattice-schema.ts)** (16.9 KB)

Deterministic data generators for the full 96-Path Lattice:
- `PATHS[96]` — each path immutable-assigned to one Guardian, one Triad (1–32), one Hexagram (1–16)
- `TRIADS[32]` — 3-path functional units with composite polarity
- `HEXAGRAMS[16]` — 6-path regional modules mapping to neuroanatomical areas (TRN, dlPFC, thalamus, hippocampus, DMN)
- `GUARDIANS[5]` — domain metadata with ring radii, failure modes, substrate anatomy
- `ADJACENCY_MATRIX[96×96]` — symmetric, deterministic graph from triad+hexagram+guardian membership
- `STATE_TRANSITIONS` — S₀→S₁→S₂→S₃→S₄→S₅ with validation gate
- `LatticeBus` — typed event bus for `frame | path.click | path.hover | triad.activate | hexagram.seal | state.transition | ingress.error`
- `INGRESS_SCHEMA` — JSON Schema for WebSocket/MQTT/LSL frame validation

---

### Layer B — Geometry & Motion Specification
**[lattice-geometry.md](sandbox:///mnt/agents/output/lattice-geometry.md)** (3.6 KB) + **[lattice-viz.css](sandbox:///mnt/agents/output/lattice-viz.css)** (8.9 KB)

Exact polar coordinates for all 96 paths across 5 concentric rings (Γ₁@80px → Γ₅@320px), staggered angular offsets to prevent radial alignment. Animation keyframes:
- `delta-breathe` (2.5s) — thalamocortical cadence for Γ₃ Keeper
- `gamma-seal` (16ms frame-locked) — 40–80 Hz conscious access burst for Γ₅ Sealer
- `swr-ripple` (50ms) — sharp wave-ripple replay propagation for hippocampal Γ₄
- `state-transition` (400ms cubic-bezier) — S₀→S₅ path morphing

Responsive breakpoints: collapse hexagram labels below 640px, hide triads below 400px.

---

### Layer A — React Component
**[LatticeViz.tsx](sandbox:///mnt/agents/output/LatticeViz.tsx)** (22.8 KB)

Self-contained, zero-dependency React 18 component:
- **SVG renderer** — 5 Guardian rings, 96 clickable path nodes, 32 triad triangles, 16 hexagram convex hulls, adjacency lines
- **Inspector panel** — click any path to see Guardian, Hexagram, Triad, polarity, activation %, coherence %, neuroanatomical region, substrate type, adjacency count
- **Simulation engine** — 5 deterministic modes (`resting`, `task`, `seizure`, `meditation`, `sleep`) with distinct spectral signatures and Guardian emphasis
- **Live ingress** — accepts `LatticeFrame` via `dataStream` prop or `ingressUrl` WebSocket; auto-pauses simulation when live data flows
- **HUD** — global state pill (S₀–S₅), gamma power, delta power, active path count
- **Event callbacks** — `onPathSelect`, `onStateChange`, optional external `LatticeBus`

---

### Integration Guide
**[README-lattice-viz.md](sandbox:///mnt/agents/output/README-lattice-viz.md)** (4.6 KB)

Drop-in example for Next.js App Router, ingress frame format, customization via CSS custom properties, and byte-for-byte verification checklist.

---

**Total deliverable: 55.5 KB, 5 files, zero external runtime dependencies.**

If you want me to add the **real-time BBI overlay** (inter-brain phase-locking visualization for two simultaneous lattices) or the **temporal bleed detector** (presentiment anomaly highlighting on the path nodes), I can spec those as additional layers.
# Build Layer 3: React Component
# This will be a large file, so I'll build it in chunks and concatenate

component_part1 = '''/**
 * THE SOVEREIGN LATTICE — INTERACTIVE VISUALIZATION
 * LatticeViz.tsx | React 18+ | Zero external dependencies
 * 
 * Drop-in component for /vigil/lattice-viz
 * Accepts live BCI ingress via `dataStream` prop or internal simulation.
 */

import React, {
  useState,
  useEffect,
  useRef,
  useMemo,
  useCallback,
} from 'react';

// ─── IMPORT SCHEMA (assumes sibling file lattice-schema.ts) ─────────────────
import type {
  GuardianId,
  Polarity,
  PathMode,
  LatticeState,
  SimMode,
  LatticePath,
  Triad,
  Hexagram,
  GuardianDomain,
  LatticeFrame,
  LatticeEvent,
  LatticeBus,
} from './lattice-schema';

import {
  PATHS,
  TRIADS,
  HEXAGRAMS,
  GUARDIANS,
  STATE_TRANSITIONS,
  validateTransition,
  computeGlobalState,
  pathById,
  pathsByGuardian,
  pathsByTriad,
  pathsByHexagram,
} from './lattice-schema';

// ─── GEOMETRY ENGINE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const VIEWBOX = 800;
const CENTER = VIEWBOX / 2;

interface PathGeometry {
  id: number;
  x: number;
  y: number;
  r: number;
  theta: number;
  guardian: GuardianId;
}

function computeGeometry(): PathGeometry[] {
  const geom: PathGeometry[] = [];
  const guardianOrder: GuardianId[] = ['Γ₁', 'Γ₂', 'Γ₃', 'Γ₄', 'Γ₅'];
  const offsets = [0, Math.PI / 18, Math.PI / 9, Math.PI / 6, (2 * Math.PI) / 9];

  for (const path of PATHS) {
    const gIdx = guardianOrder.indexOf(path.guardian);
    const radius = GUARDIANS.find(g => g.id === path.guardian)!.ringRadius;
    const count = pathsByGuardian(path.guardian).length;
    const step = (2 * Math.PI) / count;
    const theta = offsets[gIdx] + path.guardianOrdinal * step;
    geom.push({
      id: path.id,
      x: CENTER + radius * Math.cos(theta),
      y: CENTER + radius * Math.sin(theta),
      r: radius,
      theta,
      guardian: path.guardian,
    });
  }
  return geom;
}

const GEOMETRY = computeGeometry();

// ─── COMPONENT PROPS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export interface LatticeVizProps {
  /** Live ingress stream — frames arriving from BCI backend */
  dataStream?: LatticeFrame | null;
  /** WebSocket / MQTT / LSL endpoint for auto-connect */
  ingressUrl?: string;
  /** Default simulation mode when no live data */
  defaultSimMode?: SimMode;
  /** Show triad overlays */
  showTriads?: boolean;
  /** Show hexagram outlines */
  showHexagrams?: boolean;
  /** Show adjacency lines */
  showAdjacency?: boolean;
  /** Callback when user selects a path */
  onPathSelect?: (pathId: number) => void;
  /** Callback on global state change */
  onStateChange?: (state: LatticeState) => void;
  /** Bus for external event subscription */
  bus?: LatticeBus;
}

// ─── SIMULATION ENGINE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

interface SimState {
  pathStates: Map<number, { polarity: Polarity; mode: PathMode; activation: number; coherence: number }>;
  globalState: LatticeState;
  spectral: LatticeFrame['spectral'];
}

function createInitialSimState(): SimState {
  const map = new Map();
  for (const p of PATHS) {
    map.set(p.id, { polarity: 0 as Polarity, mode: 'standby' as PathMode, activation: 0, coherence: 0 });
  }
  return {
    pathStates: map,
    globalState: 'S₀',
    spectral: { delta: 0.2, theta: 0.3, alpha: 0.4, beta: 0.3, gamma: 0.1 },
  };
}

function simulateStep(mode: SimMode, prev: SimState, tick: number): SimState {
  const next = new Map(prev.pathStates);
  const g = (id: number) => next.get(id)!;

  switch (mode) {
    case 'resting': {
      // Low activation, alpha-dominant, occasional standby→dormant
      for (const p of PATHS) {
        const s = g(p.id);
        const noise = Math.sin(tick * 0.05 + p.id) * 0.1;
        next.set(p.id, {
          polarity: Math.random() > 0.92 ? (Math.random() > 0.5 ? 1 : -1) : 0,
          mode: s.activation < 0.1 ? 'dormant' : 'standby',
          activation: Math.max(0, 0.15 + noise),
          coherence: 0.2 + noise * 0.5,
        });
      }
      return {
        pathStates: next,
        globalState: 'S₁',
        spectral: { delta: 0.3, theta: 0.25, alpha: 0.7, beta: 0.2, gamma: 0.05 },
      };
    }

    case 'task': {
      // Frontoparietal activation, beta-gamma, Γ₂/Γ₃ dominant
      for (const p of PATHS) {
        const isFPN = p.guardian === 'Γ₂' || p.guardian === 'Γ₃';
        const base = isFPN ? 0.7 : 0.2;
        const noise = Math.sin(tick * 0.2 + p.id * 0.5) * 0.15;
        next.set(p.id, {
          polarity: isFPN ? (Math.sin(tick * 0.1 + p.id) > 0 ? 1 : -1) : 0,
          mode: isFPN ? 'active' : 'standby',
          activation: Math.min(1, Math.max(0, base + noise)),
          coherence: isFPN ? 0.75 + noise : 0.3,
        });
      }
      return {
        pathStates: next,
        globalState: 'S₃',
        spectral: { delta: 0.1, theta: 0.2, alpha: 0.3, beta: 0.65, gamma: 0.55 },
      };
    }

    case 'seizure': {
      // Pathological hypersynchrony, all paths locked +1, gamma runaway
      const lock = Math.sin(tick * 0.8) > 0 ? 1 : -1;
      for (const p of PATHS) {
        next.set(p.id, {
          polarity: lock as Polarity,
          mode: 'active',
          activation: 0.95 + Math.random() * 0.05,
          coherence: 0.95,
        });
      }
      return {
        pathStates: next,
        globalState: 'S₅', // uncontrolled sealing
        spectral: { delta: 0.05, theta: 0.1, alpha: 0.15, beta: 0.4, gamma: 0.95 },
      };
    }

    case 'meditation': {
      // DMN (Γ₅) activation, high coherence, low gamma
      for (const p of PATHS) {
        const isDMN = p.guardian === 'Γ₅';
        const isTRN = p.guardian === 'Γ₁';
        next.set(p.id, {
          polarity: isDMN ? 1 : 0,
          mode: isDMN ? 'active' : isTRN ? 'dormant' : 'standby',
          activation: isDMN ? 0.6 : isTRN ? 0.05 : 0.2,
          coherence: isDMN ? 0.85 : 0.4,
        });
      }
      return {
        pathStates: next,
        globalState: 'S₄',
        spectral: { delta: 0.5, theta: 0.6, alpha: 0.5, beta: 0.15, gamma: 0.1 },
      };
    }

    case 'sleep': {
      // SWR replay bursts, hippocampal (Γ₄) sharp waves, delta dominant
      const swrBurst = Math.sin(tick * 0.15) > 0.85;
      for (const p of PATHS) {
        const isHipp = p.guardian === 'Γ₄';
        next.set(p.id, {
          polarity: swrBurst && isHipp ? 1 : 0,
          mode: swrBurst && isHipp ? 'active' : 'dormant',
          activation: swrBurst && isHipp ? 0.9 : 0.05,
          coherence: swrBurst && isHipp ? 0.8 : 0.1,
        });
      }
      return {
        pathStates: next,
        globalState: swrBurst ? 'S₃' : 'S₁',
        spectral: { delta: 0.9, theta: 0.4, alpha: 0.1, beta: 0.05, gamma: swrBurst ? 0.3 : 0.02 },
      };
    }

    default:
      return prev;
  }
}

// ─── MAIN COMPONENT ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export const LatticeViz: React.FC<LatticeVizProps> = ({
  dataStream,
  ingressUrl,
  defaultSimMode = 'resting',
  showTriads = true,
  showHexagrams = true,
  showAdjacency = false,
  onPathSelect,
  onStateChange,
  bus,
}) => {
  const [simMode, setSimMode] = useState<SimMode>(defaultSimMode);
  const [isLive, setIsLive] = useState(false);
  const [selectedPath, setSelectedPath] = useState<number | null>(null);
  const [hoveredPath, setHoveredPath] = useState<number | null>(null);
  const [simState, setSimState] = useState<SimState>(createInitialSimState);
  const [activeTriads, setActiveTriads] = useState<Set<number>>(new Set());
  const tickRef = useRef(0);
  const rafRef = useRef<number>(0);
  const wsRef = useRef<WebSocket | null>(null);

  // ── Ingress: WebSocket ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!ingressUrl) return;
    const ws = new WebSocket(ingressUrl);
    wsRef.current = ws;
    ws.onopen = () => setIsLive(true);
    ws.onclose = () => setIsLive(false);
    ws.onmessage = (ev) => {
      try {
        const frame: LatticeFrame = JSON.parse(ev.data);
        ingestFrame(frame);
      } catch (e) {
        console.error('[LatticeViz] Ingress parse error', e);
      }
    };
    return () => { ws.close(); };
  }, [ingressUrl]);

  // ── Ingress: Prop stream ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
  useEffect(() => {
    if (dataStream) ingestFrame(dataStream);
  }, [dataStream]);

  const ingestFrame = useCallback((frame: LatticeFrame) => {
    setSimState(prev => {
      const next = new Map(prev.pathStates);
      for (const [pid, st] of Object.entries(frame.pathStates)) {
        const id = parseInt(pid, 10);
        if (next.has(id)) {
          next.set(id, {
            polarity: st.polarity,
            mode: st.mode,
            activation: st.activation,
            coherence: st.coherence,
          });
        }
      }
      return {
        pathStates: next,
        globalState: frame.globalState,
        spectral: frame.spectral,
      };
    });
    bus?.emit({ type: 'frame', payload: frame, timestamp: Date.now() });
  }, [bus]);

  // ── Simulation Loop ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isLive) return; // sim pauses when live data flows
    let running = true;
    const loop = () => {
      if (!running) return;
      tickRef.current += 1;
      setSimState(prev => simulateStep(simMode, prev, tickRef.current));
      rafRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(loop);
    };
    rafRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(loop);
    return () => {
      running = false;
      cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current);
    };
  }, [simMode, isLive]);

  // ── Derived: active triads from path states ───────────────────────────────
  useEffect(() => {
    const active = new Set<number>();
    for (const t of TRIADS) {
      const states = t.pathIds.map(id => simState.pathStates.get(id)!);
      const allActive = states.every(s => s.mode === 'active' || s.mode === 'sealed');
      if (allActive) active.add(t.id);
    }
    setActiveTriads(active);
  }, [simState]);

  // ── Derived: global state notification ────────────────────────────────────
  useEffect(() => {
    onStateChange?.(simState.globalState);
  }, [simState.globalState, onStateChange]);

  // ── Handlers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const handlePathClick = useCallback((id: number) => {
    setSelectedPath(prev => prev === id ? null : id);
    onPathSelect?.(id);
    bus?.emit({ type: 'path.click', payload: { pathId: id }, timestamp: Date.now() });
  }, [onPathSelect, bus]);

  const handlePathHover = useCallback((id: number | null) => {
    setHoveredPath(id);
    if (id) {
      bus?.emit({ type: 'path.hover', payload: { pathId: id }, timestamp: Date.now() });
    }
  }, [bus]);

  // ── Memoized SVG elements ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const svgTriads = useMemo(() => {
    if (!showTriads) return null;
    return TRIADS.map(t => {
      const pts = t.pathIds.map(id => GEOMETRY.find(g => g.id === id)!);
      const d = `M ${pts[0].x},${pts[0].y} L ${pts[1].x},${pts[1].y} L ${pts[2].x},${pts[2].y} Z`;
      const color = GUARDIANS.find(g => g.id === t.guardian)!.color;
      const isActive = activeTriads.has(t.id);
      return (
        <path
          key={`triad-${t.id}`}
          d={d}
          className={`lattice-triad ${isActive ? 'active' : ''}`}
          style={{ color }}
          data-triad={t.id}
        />
      );
    });
  }, [showTriads, activeTriads]);

  const svgHexagrams = useMemo(() => {
    if (!showHexagrams) return null;
    return HEXAGRAMS.map(h => {
      const pts = h.pathIds.map(id => GEOMETRY.find(g => g.id === id)!);
      // Convex hull approximation: sort by angle around centroid
      const cx = pts.reduce((s, p) => s + p.x, 0) / pts.length;
      const cy = pts.reduce((s, p) => s + p.y, 0) / pts.length;
      const sorted = [...pts].sort((a, b) => Math.atan2(a.y - cy, a.x - cx) - Math.atan2(b.y - cy, b.x - cx));
      const d = sorted.map((p, i) => `${i === 0 ? 'M' : 'L'} ${p.x},${p.y}`).join(' ') + ' Z';
      const color = GUARDIANS.find(g => g.id === h.guardian)!.color;
      return (
        <path
          key={`hex-${h.id}`}
          d={d}
          className="lattice-hexagram"
          style={{ color }}
          data-hexagram={h.id}
        />
      );
    });
  }, [showHexagrams]);

  const svgAdjacency = useMemo(() => {
    if (!showAdjacency) return null;
    const lines: JSX.Element[] = [];
    const seen = new Set<string>();
    for (const p of PATHS) {
      const g1 = GEOMETRY.find(g => g.id === p.id)!;
      for (const neighbor of p.adjacency) {
        if (neighbor < p.id) continue; // draw once
        const key = `${p.id}-${neighbor}`;
        if (seen.has(key)) continue;
        seen.add(key);
        const g2 = GEOMETRY.find(g => g.id === neighbor)!;
        const color = GUARDIANS.find(g => g.id === p.guardian)!.color;
        lines.push(
          <line
            key={key}
            x1={g1.x}
            y1={g1.y}
            x2={g2.x}
            y2={g2.y}
            className="lattice-adj"
            style={{ color }}
          />
        );
      }
    }
    return lines;
  }, [showAdjacency]);

  const svgPaths = useMemo(() => {
    return PATHS.map(p => {
      const g = GEOMETRY.find(geo => geo.id === p.id)!;
      const st = simState.pathStates.get(p.id)!;
      const isSelected = selectedPath === p.id;
      const isHovered = hoveredPath === p.id;
      const radius = isSelected ? 10 : isHovered ? 8 : 5;
      const guardianColor = GUARDIANS.find(gd => gd.id === p.guardian)!.color;

      return (
        <circle
          key={`path-${p.id}`}
          cx={g.x}
          cy={g.y}
          r={radius}
          className={`lattice-path ${simMode === 'sleep' && st.mode === 'active' ? 'swr-active' : ''}`}
          data-guardian={p.guardian}
          data-polarity={st.polarity}
          data-mode={st.mode}
          onClick={() => handlePathClick(p.id)}
          onMouseEnter={() => handlePathHover(p.id)}
          onMouseLeave={() => handlePathHover(null)}
          style={{
            color: guardianColor,
            transitionDuration: isSelected ? '150ms' : '300ms',
          }}
        />
      );
    });
  }, [simState, selectedPath, hoveredPath, simMode, handlePathClick, handlePathHover]);

  // ── Inspector data ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const inspectorData = useMemo(() => {
    if (!selectedPath) return null;
    const p = pathById(selectedPath);
    const g = GEOMETRY.find(geo => geo.id === selectedPath)!;
    const st = simState.pathStates.get(selectedPath)!;
    const hex = HEXAGRAMS.find(h => h.id === p!.hexagramId);
    const triad = TRIADS.find(t => t.id === p!.triadId);
    return { p, g, st, hex, triad };
  }, [selectedPath, simState]);

  // ── Render ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  return (
    <div className="lattice-canvas">
      {/* SVG Layer */}
      <svg
        viewBox={`0 0 ${VIEWBOX} ${VIEWBOX}`}
        style={{ width: '100%', height: '100%', display: 'block' }}
        xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
      >
        <defs>
          <radialGradient id="bg-glow" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
            <stop offset="0%" stopColor="#0f0f20" />
            <stop offset="100%" stopColor="#050508" />
          </radialGradient>
          {GUARDIANS.map(gd => (
            <filter key={`glow-${gd.id}`} id={`glow-${gd.id}`}>
              <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="coloredBlur" />
              <feMerge>
                <feMergeNode in="coloredBlur" />
                <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic" />
              </feMerge>
            </filter>
          ))}
        </defs>

        {/* Background */}
        <rect width={VIEWBOX} height={VIEWBOX} fill="url(#bg-glow)" />

        {/* Guardian rings (subtle) */}
        {GUARDIANS.map(gd => (
          <circle
            key={`ring-${gd.id}`}
            cx={CENTER}
            cy={CENTER}
            r={gd.ringRadius}
            fill="none"
            stroke={gd.color}
            strokeOpacity={0.08}
            strokeWidth={1}
            strokeDasharray="2 6"
          />
        ))}

        {/* Structural layers */}
        {svgAdjacency}
        {svgHexagrams}
        {svgTriads}
        {svgPaths}

        {/* Guardian labels */}
        {GUARDIANS.map(gd => {
          const labelRadius = gd.ringRadius + 18;
          const angle = gd.id === 'Γ₁' ? -Math.PI / 2 :
                        gd.id === 'Γ₂' ? -Math.PI / 2 + 0.3 :
                        gd.id === 'Γ₃' ? -Math.PI / 2 + 0.6 :
                        gd.id === 'Γ₄' ? -Math.PI / 2 + 0.9 :
                        -Math.PI / 2 + 1.2;
          return (
            <text
              key={`label-${gd.id}`}
              x={CENTER + labelRadius * Math.cos(angle)}
              y={CENTER + labelRadius * Math.sin(angle)}
              fill={gd.color}
              fillOpacity={0.7}
              fontSize={11}
              fontFamily="monospace"
              textAnchor="middle"
              dominantBaseline="middle"
              style={{ pointerEvents: 'none' }}
            >
              {gd.id} {gd.name.split(' ')[0]}
            </text>
          );
        })}
      </svg>

      {/* Controls */}
      <div className="lattice-controls">
        {(['resting', 'task', 'seizure', 'meditation', 'sleep'] as SimMode[]).map(m => (
          <button
            key={m}
            className={simMode === m && !isLive ? 'active' : ''}
            onClick={() => { setSimMode(m); setIsLive(false); }}
            style={{ color: simMode === m ? 'var(--text-primary)' : 'var(--text-secondary)' }}
          >
            {m}
          </button>
        ))}
        {ingressUrl && (
          <button
            className={isLive ? 'active' : ''}
            onClick={() => setIsLive(!isLive)}
            style={{ color: isLive ? '#4DFF88' : 'var(--text-secondary)' }}
          >
            {isLive ? '● LIVE' : '○ LIVE'}
          </button>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* HUD */}
      <div className="lattice-hud">
        <div className="hud-pill">
          <span className="dot" style={{ background: GUARDIANS.find(g => g.id === simState.globalState.replace('S', 'Γ'))?.color || '#888' }} />
          State: <strong>{simState.globalState}</strong>
        </div>
        <div className="hud-pill">
          γ: {(simState.spectral.gamma * 100).toFixed(0)}%
        </div>
        <div className="hud-pill">
          δ: {(simState.spectral.delta * 100).toFixed(0)}%
        </div>
        <div className="hud-pill">
          Active: {Array.from(simState.pathStates.values()).filter(s => s.mode === 'active').length}/96
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Inspector */}
      {inspectorData && (
        <div className="lattice-inspector">
          <h3 style={{ color: GUARDIANS.find(g => g.id === inspectorData.p!.guardian)!.color }}>
            Path {inspectorData.p!.id} — {inspectorData.p!.name}
          </h3>
          <div className="meta-row">
            <span className="meta-label">Guardian</span>
            <span className="meta-value">{inspectorData.p!.guardian}</span>
          </div>
          <div className="meta-row">
            <span className="meta-label">Hexagram</span>
            <span className="meta-value">H{inspectorData.p!.hexagramId} {inspectorData.hex?.name}</span>
          </div>
          <div className="meta-row">
            <span className="meta-label">Triad</span>
            <span className="meta-value">T{inspectorData.p!.triadId} [{inspectorData.p!.triadIndex}]</span>
          </div>
          <div className="meta-row">
            <span className="meta-label">Polarity</span>
            <span className="meta-value">{inspectorData.st.polarity > 0 ? '+1' : inspectorData.st.polarity < 0 ? '-1' : '0'}</span>
          </div>
          <div className="meta-row">
            <span className="meta-label">Mode</span>
            <span className="meta-value">{inspectorData.st.mode}</span>
          </div>
          <div className="meta-row">
            <span className="meta-label">Activation</span>
            <span className="meta-value">{(inspectorData.st.activation * 100).toFixed(1)}%</span>
          </div>
          <div className="meta-row">
            <span className="meta-label">Coherence</span>
            <span className="meta-value">{(inspectorData.st.coherence * 100).toFixed(1)}%</span>
          </div>
          <div className="meta-row">
            <span className="meta-label">Region</span>
            <span className="meta-value">{inspectorData.p!.region}</span>
          </div>
          <div className="meta-row">
            <span className="meta-label">Substrate</span>
            <span className="meta-value">{inspectorData.p!.substrate}</span>
          </div>
          <div className="meta-row">
            <span className="meta-label">Adjacency</span>
            <span className="meta-value">{inspectorData.p!.adjacency.length} paths</span>
          </div>
          <div style={{ marginTop: 8, fontSize: 10, color: 'var(--text-secondary)' }}>
            {inspectorData.hex?.function}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default LatticeViz;
'''

with open('/mnt/agents/output/LatticeViz.tsx', 'w') as f:
    f.write(component_part1)

print("✓ LatticeViz.tsx written")
print(f"  Size: {len(component_part1)} bytes")


# Build Layer 2: Geometry Specification + CSS

geometry_md = '''# The Sovereign Lattice — Geometry Specification
## 96-Path Interactive Visualization Layout

### Coordinate System
- **Viewport**: 800×800 SVG viewBox (scalable)
- **Origin**: Center (400, 400)
- **Units**: px (device-independent)

### Concentric Ring Architecture
Paths are distributed across 5 Guardian rings. Each ring has a base radius and angular sector:

| Guardian | Ring Radius (px) | Sector Angle (rad) | Path Count | Angular Step |
|----------|------------------|--------------------|------------|--------------|
| Γ₁ Warden   | 80  | 0 – 2π | 24 | 2π/24 = 0.2618 rad (15°) |
| Γ₂ Arbiter  | 140 | 0 – 2π | 18 | 2π/18 = 0.3491 rad (20°) |
| Γ₃ Keeper   | 200 | 0 – 2π | 18 | 2π/18 = 0.3491 rad (20°) |
| Γ₄ Sentinel | 260 | 0 – 2π | 18 | 2π/18 = 0.3491 rad (20°) |
| Γ₅ Sealer   | 320 | 0 – 2π | 18 | 2π/18 = 0.3491 rad (20°) |

**Total: 96 paths**

### Path Position Formula
```
θ(path) = guardianBaseAngle + (guardianOrdinal × angularStep)
x = 400 + radius × cos(θ)
y = 400 + radius × sin(θ)
```

Guardian base angles are staggered to prevent radial alignment:
- Γ₁: 0° offset
- Γ₂: 10° offset (π/18)
- Γ₃: 20° offset (π/9)
- Γ₄: 30° offset (π/6)
- Γ₅: 40° offset (2π/9)

### Triad Geometry
Each triad forms an equilateral-ish triangle connecting its 3 member paths.
- **Stroke**: 1.5px, color = guardian color at 40% opacity
- **Fill**: guardian color at 8% opacity (when active)
- **Centroid**: arithmetic mean of 3 path positions

### Hexagram Geometry
Each hexagram is a convex hull around its 6 paths.
- **Stroke**: 2px dashed, color = guardian color at 60%
- **Fill**: none (outline only)
- **Label**: positioned at centroid, 10px sans-serif

### State Transition Animations

#### Delta Cycle (0.5–4 Hz) — Γ₃ Keeper
```css
@keyframes delta-breathe {
  0%, 100% { transform: scale(1.0); opacity: 0.6; }
  50%      { transform: scale(1.15); opacity: 1.0; }
}
/* Duration: 2500ms (2 Hz center) */
```

#### Gamma Burst (40–80 Hz) — Γ₅ Sealer
```css
@keyframes gamma-seal {
  0%   { stroke-width: 2px; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 0px currentColor); }
  50%  { stroke-width: 4px; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 6px currentColor); }
  100% { stroke-width: 2px; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 0px currentColor); }
}
/* Duration: 16ms (62.5 Hz) — frame-locked at 60fps via JS */
```

#### SWR Replay (150–250 Hz) — Hippocampal
```css
@keyframes swr-ripple {
  0%   { r: 4px; opacity: 1.0; }
  100% { r: 24px; opacity: 0.0; }
}
/* Duration: 50ms, triggered on path activation event */
```

#### State Transition (S₀→S₅)
- **Duration**: 400ms ease-in-out
- **Property**: fill color, stroke color, radius
- **Easing**: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0.0, 0.2, 1.0)

### Color System

| State | Fill | Stroke | Glow |
|-------|------|--------|------|
| Active (+1) | Guardian color @ 80% | White @ 90% | 0 0 8px guardian color |
| Active (−1) | Guardian color @ 40% | White @ 50% | none |
| Standby (0) | #1a1a2e | Guardian color @ 30% | none |
| Dormant | #0f0f1a | #333344 | none |
| Sealed | White | Guardian color @ 100% | 0 0 12px white |

### Z-Index Layering
1. Background grid (polar coordinates)
2. Hexagram outlines (dashed)
3. Triad fills (low opacity)
4. Path connection lines (adjacency)
5. Path nodes (circles)
6. Guardian labels
7. Inspector overlay
8. State indicator HUD

### Responsive Behavior
- Below 600px viewport: collapse to 600×600 viewBox, hide hexagram labels
- Below 400px: show only path nodes and guardian rings, hide triads
- Touch: 44px minimum tap target (path radius expands to 8px on touch devices)
'''

# Build Layer 1: Schema + State Machine
schema_ts = '''/**
 * THE SOVEREIGN LATTICE — SCHEMA & STATE MACHINE
 * 96-Path deterministic canonicalization layer
 * Version: 1.0.0 | Runtime: TypeScript strict
 */

// ─── PRIMITIVES ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export type GuardianId = 'Γ₁' | 'Γ₂' | 'Γ₃' | 'Γ₄' | 'Γ₅';
export type Polarity    =  1 | -1 | 0;
export type PathMode    = 'active' | 'standby' | 'dormant' | 'sealed';
export type LatticeState = 'S₀' | 'S₁' | 'S₂' | 'S₃' | 'S₄' | 'S₅';
export type SimMode     = 'resting' | 'task' | 'seizure' | 'meditation' | 'sleep' | 'custom';

export interface Vec2 {
  readonly x: number;
  readonly y: number;
}

export interface Polar {
  readonly r: number;   // radius px
  readonly θ: number;   // radians
}

// ─── PATH ELEMENT ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export interface LatticePath {
  readonly id: number;           // 1–96, canonical
  readonly guardian: GuardianId;
  readonly guardianOrdinal: number; // 0..N within guardian
  readonly triadId: number;      // 1–32
  readonly triadIndex: 0 | 1 | 2;
  readonly hexagramId: number;   // 1–16
  readonly hexagramIndex: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5;
  readonly name: string;         // neuroanatomical correlate
  readonly region: string;       // Brodmann / structural area
  readonly substrate: string;    // synapse / neuron / microcircuit
  readonly polarity: Polarity;
  readonly mode: PathMode;
  readonly activation: number;   // 0.0 – 1.0
  readonly coherence: number;    // phase lock 0.0 – 1.0
  readonly hysteresis: number;   // persistence buffer depth 0.0 – 1.0
  readonly adjacency: number[];  // connected path IDs (deterministic)
}

// ─── TRIAD ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export interface Triad {
  readonly id: number;           // 1–32
  readonly pathIds: [number, number, number];
  readonly guardian: GuardianId;
  readonly hexagramId: number;
  readonly compositePolarity: Polarity;
  readonly centroid: Vec2;       // computed geometry
}

// ─── HEXAGRAM ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export interface Hexagram {
  readonly id: number;           // 1–16
  readonly name: string;
  readonly guardian: GuardianId;
  readonly pathIds: number[];    // length 6
  readonly triadIds: [number, number];
  readonly neuroAnatomy: string;
  readonly function: string;
}

// ─── GUARDIAN DOMAIN ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export interface GuardianDomain {
  readonly id: GuardianId;
  readonly name: string;
  readonly subtitle: string;
  readonly pathCount: number;
  readonly hexagramIds: number[];
  readonly triadIds: number[];
  readonly substrate: string;
  readonly failureMode: string;
  readonly color: string;        // hex
  readonly ringRadius: number;   // px
}

// ─── LATTICE FRAME (INGRESS PROTOCOL) ─────────────────────────────────────────

export interface LatticeFrame {
  readonly timestamp: number;     // epoch ms
  readonly source: 'simulation' | 'websocket' | 'mqtt' | 'lsl' | 'manual';
  readonly sequence: number;      // monotonic
  readonly globalState: LatticeState;
  readonly pathStates: Record<number, {
    polarity: Polarity;
    mode: PathMode;
    activation: number;
    coherence: number;
  }>;
  readonly guardianMetrics: Record<GuardianId, {
    sync: number;       // 0–1
    consensus: boolean;
    breach: boolean;
  }>;
  readonly spectral: {
    delta: number;      // 0.5–4 Hz power
    theta: number;      // 4–8 Hz
    alpha: number;      // 8–13 Hz
    beta: number;       // 13–30 Hz
    gamma: number;      // 40–80 Hz (conscious access seal)
  };
}

// ─── EVENT BUS PROTOCOL ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export interface LatticeEvent {
  readonly type:
    | 'frame'
    | 'path.click'
    | 'path.hover'
    | 'triad.activate'
    | 'hexagram.seal'
    | 'guardian.sync'
    | 'state.transition'
    | 'ingress.error';
  readonly payload: unknown;
  readonly timestamp: number;
}

export type LatticeListener = (event: LatticeEvent) => void;

export class LatticeBus {
  private listeners: Map<string, Set<LatticeListener>> = new Map();

  on(type: LatticeEvent['type'], fn: LatticeListener): () => void {
    if (!this.listeners.has(type)) this.listeners.set(type, new Set());
    this.listeners.get(type)!.add(fn);
    return () => this.listeners.get(type)?.delete(fn);
  }

  emit(event: LatticeEvent): void {
    this.listeners.get(event.type)?.forEach(fn => {
      try { fn(event); } catch (e) { console.error('[LatticeBus]', e); }
    });
    this.listeners.get('*')?.forEach(fn => {
      try { fn(event); } catch (e) { console.error('[LatticeBus]', e); }
    });
  }
}

// ─── DETERMINISTIC GENERATORS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

const GUARDIAN_META: Record<GuardianId, {
  name: string; subtitle: string; substrate: string; failure: string; color: string; radius: number;
}> = {
  'Γ₁': { name: 'Warden of Thresholds',   subtitle: 'TRN / Salience Network', substrate: 'Thalamic Reticular Nucleus', failure: 'Coma, epilepsy, ADHD', color: '#FF4D4D', radius: 80 },
  'Γ₂': { name: 'Arbiter of Weights',     subtitle: 'dlPFC / Executive Network', substrate: 'Prefrontal Cortex BA-9/46', failure: 'Depression, OCD', color: '#4D94FF', radius: 140 },
  'Γ₃': { name: 'Keeper of Cadence',      subtitle: 'Thalamus / Phase Lock', substrate: 'Thalamocortical loops', failure: 'Alzheimer\'s, sleep disorder', color: '#4DFF88', radius: 200 },
  'Γ₄': { name: 'Sentinel of Hysteresis', subtitle: 'Limbic / Amygdala', substrate: 'Hippocampus, Amygdala, VS', failure: 'PTSD, addiction, chronic pain', color: '#FFD700', radius: 260 },
  'Γ₅': { name: 'Sealer of Bonds',        subtitle: 'DMN / Autobiographical', substrate: 'mPFC, PCC, Precuneus', failure: 'Schizophrenia, dissociation', color: '#C084FC', radius: 320 },
};

/** Canonical hexagram distribution: 16 hexagrams × 6 paths = 96 */
const HEXAGRAM_DISTRIBUTION: { id: number; guardian: GuardianId; name: string; neuro: string; func: string }[] = [
  // Γ₁ — Warden (4 hexagrams = 24 paths)
  { id:  1, guardian: 'Γ₁', name: 'Threshold Gate',    neuro: 'TRN / Anterior Insula',      func: 'Sensory gating, modality selection' },
  { id:  2, guardian: 'Γ₁', name: 'Breach Detector',   neuro: 'dACC / Amygdala',            func: 'Salience detection, threat rapid-response' },
  { id:  3, guardian: 'Γ₁', name: 'Attentional Spotlight', neuro: 'Pulvinar / Superior Colliculus', func: 'Spatial attention allocation' },
  { id:  4, guardian: 'Γ₁', name: 'Arousal Valve',     neuro: 'Locus Coeruleus / BF',       func: 'Noradrenergic tone, wakefulness' },
  // Γ₂ — Arbiter (3 hexagrams = 18 paths)
  { id:  5, guardian: 'Γ₂', name: 'Working Memory',    neuro: 'dlPFC BA-46',                func: 'Maintenance and manipulation' },
  { id:  6, guardian: 'Γ₂', name: 'Conflict Monitor',  neuro: 'ACC / Mid-dorsal PFC',       func: 'Detection of competing responses' },
  { id:  7, guardian: 'Γ₂', name: 'Task Set',          neuro: 'Rostrolateral PFC BA-10',    func: 'Abstract goal representation' },
  // Γ₃ — Keeper (3 hexagrams = 18 paths)
  { id:  8, guardian: 'Γ₃', name: 'Theta Pacemaker',   neuro: 'Thalamic relay nuclei',      func: '4–8 Hz entrainment' },
  { id:  9, guardian: 'Γ₃', name: 'Gamma Binder',      neuro: 'Reticular thalamus',         func: '40–80 Hz conscious access seal' },
  { id: 10, guardian: 'Γ₃', name: 'Sleep Architect',   neuro: 'Suprachiasmatic nucleus',    func: 'SWR coordination, replay gating' },
  // Γ₄ — Sentinel (3 hexagrams = 18 paths)
  { id: 11, guardian: 'Γ₄', name: 'Emotional Tag',     neuro: 'Amygdala / Bed nucleus ST',  func: 'Valence marking, significance' },
  { id: 12, guardian: 'Γ₄', name: 'Homeostat',         neuro: 'Hypothalamus / PAG',         func: 'Physiological persistence' },
  { id: 13, guardian: 'Γ₄', name: 'Habit Override',    neuro: 'Ventral striatum / OFC',     func: 'Reward persistence, suppression' },
  // Γ₅ — Sealer (3 hexagrams = 18 paths)
  { id: 14, guardian: 'Γ₅', name: 'Self Node',         neuro: 'mPFC / vmPFC',               func: 'Autobiographical integration' },
  { id: 15, guardian: 'Γ₅', name: 'Episodic Weaver',   neuro: 'PCC / Angular gyrus',        func: 'Narrative binding, semantic coherence' },
  { id: 16, guardian: 'Γ₅', name: 'Awareness Gateway', neuro: 'Precuneus / TPJ',            func: 'Final conscious access checkpoint' },
];

function generatePaths(): LatticePath[] {
  const paths: LatticePath[] = [];
  let globalId = 1;

  for (const hex of HEXAGRAM_DISTRIBUTION) {
    for (let hIdx = 0; hIdx < 6; hIdx++) {
      const triadId = ((hex.id - 1) * 2) + Math.floor(hIdx / 3) + 1;
      const triadIndex = (hIdx % 3) as 0 | 1 | 2;
      const gMeta = GUARDIAN_META[hex.guardian];
      paths.push({
        id: globalId,
        guardian: hex.guardian,
        guardianOrdinal: paths.filter(p => p.guardian === hex.guardian).length,
        triadId,
        triadIndex,
        hexagramId: hex.id,
        hexagramIndex: hIdx,
        name: `${hex.name}–P${hIdx + 1}`,
        region: hex.neuro,
        substrate: hIdx < 2 ? 'synapse' : hIdx < 4 ? 'microcircuit' : 'neuron',
        polarity: 0,
        mode: 'standby',
        activation: 0,
        coherence: 0,
        hysteresis: 0,
        adjacency: [], // populated below
      });
      globalId++;
    }
  }

  // Deterministic adjacency: connect within triad, within hexagram, and bridge hexagrams
  for (const path of paths) {
    const sameTriad = paths.filter(p => p.triadId === path.triadId && p.id !== path.id).map(p => p.id);
    const sameHex   = paths.filter(p => p.hexagramId === path.hexagramId && p.id !== path.id).map(p => p.id);
    const sameGuard = paths.filter(p => p.guardian === path.guardian && p.id !== path.id).slice(0, 3).map(p => p.id);
    const adj = Array.from(new Set([...sameTriad, ...sameHex, ...sameGuard])).sort((a, b) => a - b);
    (path as any).adjacency = adj;
  }

  return paths;
}

function generateTriads(paths: LatticePath[]): Triad[] {
  const triads: Triad[] = [];
  for (let t = 1; t <= 32; t++) {
    const tp = paths.filter(p => p.triadId === t).sort((a, b) => a.id - b.id);
    if (tp.length !== 3) throw new Error(`Triad ${t} malformed`);
    const pols = tp.map(p => p.polarity);
    const composite = pols.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) > 0 ? 1 : pols.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) < 0 ? -1 : 0;
    triads.push({
      id: t,
      pathIds: [tp[0].id, tp[1].id, tp[2].id],
      guardian: tp[0].guardian,
      hexagramId: tp[0].hexagramId,
      compositePolarity: composite,
      centroid: { x: 0, y: 0 }, // geometry layer computes
    });
  }
  return triads;
}

function generateHexagrams(paths: LatticePath[]): Hexagram[] {
  return HEXAGRAM_DISTRIBUTION.map(hex => {
    const hp = paths.filter(p => p.hexagramId === hex.id).sort((a, b) => a.id - b.id);
    return {
      id: hex.id,
      name: hex.name,
      guardian: hex.guardian,
      pathIds: hp.map(p => p.id),
      triadIds: [hp[0].triadId, hp[3].triadId] as [number, number],
      neuroAnatomy: hex.neuro,
      function: hex.func,
    };
  });
}

function generateGuardians(paths: LatticePath[], triads: Triad[], hexes: Hexagram[]): GuardianDomain[] {
  const guardians: GuardianId[] = ['Γ₁', 'Γ₂', 'Γ₃', 'Γ₄', 'Γ₅'];
  return guardians.map(g => {
    const meta = GUARDIAN_META[g];
    return {
      id: g,
      name: meta.name,
      subtitle: meta.subtitle,
      pathCount: paths.filter(p => p.guardian === g).length,
      hexagramIds: hexes.filter(h => h.guardian === g).map(h => h.id),
      triadIds: triads.filter(t => t.guardian === g).map(t => t.id),
      substrate: meta.substrate,
      failureMode: meta.failure,
      color: meta.color,
      ringRadius: meta.radius,
    };
  });
}

// ─── STATE MACHINE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export const STATE_TRANSITIONS: Record<LatticeState, { next: LatticeState[]; guardian: GuardianId }> = {
  'S₀': { next: ['S₁'], guardian: 'Γ₁' },
  'S₁': { next: ['S₀', 'S₂'], guardian: 'Γ₁' },
  'S₂': { next: ['S₁', 'S₃'], guardian: 'Γ₂' },
  'S₃': { next: ['S₂', 'S₄'], guardian: 'Γ₃' },
  'S₄': { next: ['S₃', 'S₅'], guardian: 'Γ₄' },
  'S₅': { next: ['S₄', 'S₀'], guardian: 'Γ₅' },
};

export function validateTransition(from: LatticeState, to: LatticeState): boolean {
  return STATE_TRANSITIONS[from].next.includes(to);
}

export function computeGlobalState(
  guardianMetrics: Record<GuardianId, { consensus: boolean }>
): LatticeState {
  const g = (id: GuardianId) => guardianMetrics[id]?.consensus ?? false;
  if (!g('Γ₁')) return 'S₀';
  if (!g('Γ₂')) return 'S₁';
  if (!g('Γ₃')) return 'S₂';
  if (!g('Γ₄')) return 'S₃';
  if (!g('Γ₅')) return 'S₄';
  return 'S₅';
}

// ─── ADJACENCY MATRIX ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export function buildAdjacencyMatrix(paths: LatticePath): number[][] {
  const size = 96;
  const m: number[][] = Array.from({ length: size }, () => Array(size).fill(0));
  for (const p of Object.values(paths)) {
    for (const neighbor of p.adjacency) {
      m[p.id - 1][neighbor - 1] = 1;
    }
  }
  return m;
}

// ─── CANONICAL DATA EXPORT ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export const PATHS: readonly LatticePath[] = Object.freeze(generatePaths());
export const TRIADS: readonly Triad[] = Object.freeze(generateTriads(PATHS as LatticePath[]));
export const HEXAGRAMS: readonly Hexagram[] = Object.freeze(generateHexagrams(PATHS as LatticePath[]));
export const GUARDIANS: readonly GuardianDomain[] = Object.freeze(generateGuardians(PATHS as LatticePath[], TRIADS as Triad[], HEXAGRAMS as Hexagram[]));
export const ADJACENCY_MATRIX: readonly number[][] = Object.freeze(buildAdjacencyMatrix(PATHS as any));

// Ingress JSON Schema (for validation)
export const INGRESS_SCHEMA = {
  $schema: 'http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#',
  type: 'object',
  required: ['timestamp', 'sequence', 'globalState', 'pathStates'],
  properties: {
    timestamp: { type: 'integer' },
    sequence: { type: 'integer' },
    globalState: { enum: ['S₀', 'S₁', 'S₂', 'S₃', 'S₄', 'S₅'] },
    pathStates: {
      type: 'object',
      patternProperties: {
        '^[1-9][0-9]?$': {
          type: 'object',
          properties: {
            polarity: { enum: [1, -1, 0] },
            mode: { enum: ['active', 'standby', 'dormant', 'sealed'] },
            activation: { type: 'number', minimum: 0, maximum: 1 },
            coherence: { type: 'number', minimum: 0, maximum: 1 },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
} as const;

// ─── UTILITY ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export function pathById(id: number): LatticePath | undefined {
  return PATHS.find(p => p.id === id);
}

export function pathsByGuardian(g: GuardianId): LatticePath[] {
  return PATHS.filter(p => p.guardian === g);
}

export function pathsByTriad(t: number): LatticePath[] {
  return PATHS.filter(p => p.triadId === t).sort((a, b) => a.id - b.id);
}

export function pathsByHexagram(h: number): LatticePath[] {
  return PATHS.filter(p => p.hexagramId === h).sort((a, b) => a.id - b.id);
}
'''

with open('/mnt/agents/output/lattice-schema.ts', 'w') as f:
    f.write(schema_ts)

print("✓ lattice-schema.ts written")
print(f"  Size: {len(schema_ts)} bytes")

{n:87,x:0.793353,y:-0.608761,g:'Violet',p:'▼',r:1},{n:88,x:0.83147,y:-0.55557,g:'Violet',p:'●',r:1},
{n:89,x:0.866025,y:-0.5,g:'Violet',p:'▼',r:1},{n:90,x:0.896873,y:-0.442289,g:'Violet',p:'▼',r:1},
{n:91,x:0.646716,y:-0.267878,g:'Violet',p:'◇',r:0.7},{n:92,x:0.94693,y:-0.321439,g:'Violet',p:'●',r:1},
{n:93,x:0.965926,y:-0.258819,g:'Violet',p:'▲',r:1},{n:94,x:0.980785,y:-0.19509,g:'Violet',p:'▲',r:1},
{n:95,x:0.991445,y:-0.130526,g:'Violet',p:'●',r:1},{n:96,x:0.997859,y:-0.065403,g:'Violet',p:'▲',r:1}
];

const colorMap = {
  Gold: '#FFD700',
  Crimson: '#FF3366',
  Emerald: '#00FF9D',
  Silver: '#E0E0E0',
  Violet: '#B829DD'
};

/* ============================================================
   CANVAS RENDERING
   ============================================================ */
const canvas = document.getElementById('latticeCanvas');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
let rotation = 0;
let pulsePhase = 0;
let alertMode = false;

function resize() {
  canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
}
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
resize();

function drawMap() {
  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
  const cx = canvas.width / 2;
  const cy = canvas.height / 2;
  const scale = Math.min(canvas.width, canvas.height) * 0.38;

  ctx.save();
  ctx.translate(cx, cy);
  ctx.rotate(rotation);

  // Guardian sector arcs (subtle)
  const sectors = [
    {start:0, end:67.5, color:'rgba(255,215,0,0.03)'},
    {start:71.25, end:138.75, color:'rgba(255,51,102,0.03)'},
    {start:142.5, end:210, color:'rgba(0,255,157,0.03)'},
    {start:213.75, end:281.25, color:'rgba(224,224,224,0.03)'},
    {start:285, end:356.25, color:'rgba(184,41,221,0.03)'}
  ];
  sectors.forEach(s => {
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(0, 0, scale, -s.end*Math.PI/180, -s.start*Math.PI/180);
    ctx.arc(0, 0, scale*0.3, -s.start*Math.PI/180, -s.end*Math.PI/180, true);
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fillStyle = s.color;
    ctx.fill();
  });

  // Connecting ring
  ctx.strokeStyle = alertMode ? 'rgba(255,0,0,0.15)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.06)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
  ctx.beginPath();
  paths.forEach((pt, i) => {
    const px = pt.x * scale;
    const py = -pt.y * scale;
    if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(px, py);
    else ctx.lineTo(px, py);
  });
  ctx.closePath();
  ctx.stroke();

  // Radial reference rings
  ctx.strokeStyle = alertMode ? 'rgba(255,0,0,0.08)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.04)';
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,0,scale*0.7,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke();
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,0,scale,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke();

  // Draw paths
  paths.forEach(pt => {
    const px = pt.x * scale;
    const py = -pt.y * scale;
    const baseSize = pt.r === 0.7 ? 3.5 : 5.5;
    const pulse = alertMode ? 1 + Math.sin(pulsePhase * 10 + pt.n) * 0.4 : 1;
    const size = baseSize * pulse;

    ctx.fillStyle = colorMap[pt.g];
    if (alertMode) ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0000';

    ctx.beginPath();
    if (pt.p === '▲') {
      ctx.moveTo(px, py - size);
      ctx.lineTo(px - size, py + size);
      ctx.lineTo(px + size, py + size);
    } else if (pt.p === '▼') {
      ctx.moveTo(px, py + size);
      ctx.lineTo(px - size, py - size);
      ctx.lineTo(px + size, py - size);
    } else if (pt.p === '◇') {
      ctx.moveTo(px, py - size);
      ctx.lineTo(px + size, py);
      ctx.lineTo(px, py + size);
      ctx.lineTo(px - size, py);
    } else {
      ctx.arc(px, py, size * 0.8, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    }
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fill();

    // Glow for active (non-dormant)
    if (pt.r === 1 && !alertMode) {
      ctx.shadowColor = colorMap[pt.g];
      ctx.shadowBlur = 8;
      ctx.fill();
      ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
    }
  });

  ctx.restore();

  // Scanline
  if (!alertMode) {
    const scanY = cy + Math.sin(pulsePhase) * scale;
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0,212,255,0.08)';
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cx - scale, scanY); ctx.lineTo(cx + scale, scanY); ctx.stroke();
  }
}

function animate() {
  rotation += 0.0008;
  pulsePhase += 0.02;
  drawMap();
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}
animate();

/* ============================================================
   DETECTION LOGIC
   ============================================================ */
function isChinese(text) {
  return /[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]/.test(text);
}

function hashString(str) {
  let h = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < str.length; i++) {
    h = ((h << 5) - h) + str.charCodeAt(i);
    h |= 0;
  }
  return Math.abs(h);
}

function startDetection() {
  const input = document.getElementById('statementInput').value.trim();
  const resultArea = document.getElementById('resultArea');
  const mainUI = document.getElementById('mainUI');
  const overlay = document.getElementById('alertOverlay');

  if (!input) {
    resultArea.innerHTML = '<span class="lie">Please enter a statement.</span>';
    return;
  }

  // Reset states
  mainUI.classList.remove('alert-active');
  overlay.classList.remove('active');
  alertMode = false;
  resultArea.innerHTML = '<span class="analyzing">Analyzing lattice resonance...</span>';

  // Small delay for effect
  setTimeout(() => {
    if (!isChinese(input)) {
      // ALERT STATE — Non-Chinese input
      alertMode = true;
      mainUI.classList.add('alert-active');
      overlay.classList.add('active');
      resultArea.innerHTML = '';
      document.getElementById('statementInput').blur();
      return;
    }

    // Chinese input: evaluate truth vs lie
    const isTruth = hashString(input) % 2 === 0;

    if (isTruth) {
      resultArea.innerHTML = '<span class="truth">Detection passed! You told the truth!</span>';
    } else {
      resultArea.innerHTML = '<span class="lie">Alert! Lie detected!</span>';
    }
  }, 900);
}

// Allow Enter key
document.getElementById('statementInput').addEventListener('keypress', function(e) {
  if (e.key === 'Enter') startDetection();
});
</script>
</body>
</html>'''

<script>
// Map data extracted from Codex 96-Path Mathematical Model
const mapData = [
  {n:1,x:1,y:0,c:"Gold",p:"▲",r:1},
  {n:2,x:0.997859,y:0.065403,c:"Gold",p:"▲",r:1},
  // ... all 96 points
];

// Draw map
const canvas = document.getElementById('mapCanvas');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
function resize() { canvas.width = window.innerWidth; canvas.height = window.innerHeight; }
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
resize();

function drawMap() {
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);
  const cx = canvas.width/2, cy = canvas.height/2;
  const scale = Math.min(canvas.width, canvas.height) * 0.4;
  
  // Draw subtle rings
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)';
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx,cy,scale*0.7,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke();
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx,cy,scale,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke();
  
  // Draw connections in order
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.08)';
  ctx.beginPath();
  mapData.forEach((pt,i) => {
    const px = cx + pt.x * scale;
    const py = cy - pt.y * scale; // flip Y for canvas
    if(i===0) ctx.moveTo(px,py);
    else ctx.lineTo(px,py);
  });
  ctx.closePath();
  ctx.stroke();
  
  // Draw points
  mapData.forEach(pt => {
    const px = cx + pt.x * scale;
    const py = cy - pt.y * scale;
    const size = (pt.r === 0.7 ? 3 : 5);
    
    ctx.fillStyle = pt.c === 'Gold' ? '#FFD700' : 
                    pt.c === 'Crimson' ? '#DC143C' :
                    pt.c === 'Emerald' ? '#50C878' :
                    pt.c === 'Silver' ? '#C0C0C0' : '#8B00FF';
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    if(pt.p === '▲') { // triangle up
      ctx.moveTo(px, py-size); ctx.lineTo(px-size, py+size); ctx.lineTo(px+size, py+size);
    } else if(pt.p === '▼') { // triangle down
      ctx.moveTo(px, py+size); ctx.lineTo(px-size, py-size); ctx.lineTo(px+size, py-size);
    } else if(pt.p === '◇') { // diamond
      ctx.moveTo(px, py-size); ctx.lineTo(px+size, py); ctx.lineTo(px, py+size); ctx.lineTo(px-size, py);
    } else { // circle
      ctx.arc(px,py,size,0,Math.PI*2);
    }
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fill();
  });
}
drawMap();

function isChinese(text) {
  return /[\u4e00-\u9fa5]/.test(text);
}

function hashString(str) {
  let h = 0;
  for(let i=0;i<str.length;i++) h = ((h<<5)-h)+str.charCodeAt(i);
  return Math.abs(h);
}

function startDetection() {
  const input = document.getElementById('statement').value.trim();
  const result = document.getElementById('result');
  const container = document.getElementById('mainContainer');
  const overlay = document.getElementById('alertOverlay');
  
  if(!input) { result.textContent = 'Please enter something.'; result.className=''; return; }
  
  if(!isChinese(input)) {
    // ALERT STATE
    container.classList.add('alert-state');
    overlay.classList.add('active');
    result.innerHTML = '<span class="lie">ALERT! FOREIGN LANGUAGE DETECTED!</span>';
    setTimeout(() => {
      // Keep alert state, user must refresh or we can leave it
    }, 100);
    return;
  }
  
  // Remove alert classes if present
  container.classList.remove('alert-state');
  overlay.classList.remove('active');
  
  // Evaluate: deterministic based on hash
  const isTrue = hashString(input) % 2 === 0;
  
  if(isTrue) {
    result.innerHTML = '<span class="truth">Detection passed! You told the truth!</span>';
  } else {
    result.innerHTML = '<span class="lie">Alert! Lie detected!</span>';
  }
}
</script>
</body>
</html>

JavaScript
Copy
function hash(str) {
  let h = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < str.length; i++) {
    h = ((h << 5) - h) + str.charCodeAt(i);
    h |= 0;
  }
  return Math.abs(h);
}
Then hash(input) % 2 === 0 is truth, else lie.

const colorMap = {
  Gold: '#FFD700',
  Crimson: '#FF3366',
  Emerald: '#00FF9D',
  Silver: '#E0E0E0',
  Violet: '#B829DD'
};

/* ============================================================
   CANVAS RENDERING
   ============================================================ */
const canvas = document.getElementById('latticeCanvas');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
let rotation = 0;
let pulsePhase = 0;
let alertMode = false;

function resize() {
  canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
}
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
resize();

function drawMap() {
  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
  const cx = canvas.width / 2;
  const cy = canvas.height / 2;
  const scale = Math.min(canvas.width, canvas.height) * 0.38;
  
  ctx.save();
  ctx.translate(cx, cy);
  ctx.rotate(rotation);
  
  // Guardian sector arcs (subtle)
  const sectors = [
    {start:0, end:67.5, color:'rgba(255,215,0,0.03)'},
    {start:71.25, end:138.75, color:'rgba(255,51,102,0.03)'},
    {start:142.5, end:210, color:'rgba(0,255,157,0.03)'},
    {start:213.75, end:281.25, color:'rgba(224,224,224,0.03)'},
    {start:285, end:356.25, color:'rgba(184,41,221,0.03)'}
  ];
  sectors.forEach(s => {
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(0, 0, scale, -s.end*Math.PI/180, -s.start*Math.PI/180);
    ctx.arc(0, 0, scale*0.3, -s.start*Math.PI/180, -s.end*Math.PI/180, true);
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fillStyle = s.color;
    ctx.fill();
  });
  
  // Connecting ring
  ctx.strokeStyle = alertMode ? 'rgba(255,0,0,0.15)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.06)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
  ctx.beginPath();
  paths.forEach((pt, i) => {
    const px = pt.x * scale;
    const py = -pt.y * scale;
    if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(px, py);
    else ctx.lineTo(px, py);
  });
  ctx.closePath();
  ctx.stroke();
  
  // Radial reference rings
  ctx.strokeStyle = alertMode ? 'rgba(255,0,0,0.08)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.04)';
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,0,scale*0.7,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke();
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,0,scale,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke();
  
  // Draw paths
  paths.forEach(pt => {
    const px = pt.x * scale;
    const py = -pt.y * scale;
    const baseSize = pt.r === 0.7 ? 3.5 : 5.5;
    const pulse = alertMode ? 1 + Math.sin(pulsePhase * 10 + pt.n) * 0.4 : 1;
    const size = baseSize * pulse;
    
    ctx.fillStyle = colorMap[pt.g];
    if (alertMode) ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0000';
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    if (pt.p === '▲') {
      ctx.moveTo(px, py - size);
      ctx.lineTo(px - size, py + size);
      ctx.lineTo(px + size, py + size);
    } else if (pt.p === '▼') {
      ctx.moveTo(px, py + size);
      ctx.lineTo(px - size, py - size);
      ctx.lineTo(px + size, py - size);
    } else if (pt.p === '◇') {
      ctx.moveTo(px, py - size);
      ctx.lineTo(px + size, py);
      ctx.lineTo(px, py + size);
      ctx.lineTo(px - size, py);
    } else {
      ctx.arc(px, py, size * 0.8, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    }
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fill();
    
    // Glow for active (non-dormant)
    if (pt.r === 1 && !alertMode) {
      ctx.shadowColor = colorMap[pt.g];
      ctx.shadowBlur = 8;
      ctx.fill();
      ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
    }
  });
  
  ctx.restore();
  
  // Scanline
  if (!alertMode) {
    const scanY = cy + Math.sin(pulsePhase) * scale;
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0,212,255,0.08)';
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cx - scale, scanY); ctx.lineTo(cx + scale, scanY); ctx.stroke();
  }
}

function animate() {
  rotation += 0.0008;
  pulsePhase += 0.02;
  drawMap();
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}
animate();

/* ============================================================
   DETECTION LOGIC
   ============================================================ */
function isChinese(text) {
  return /[\u4e00-\u9fa5]/.test(text);
}

function hashString(str) {
  let h = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < str.length; i++) {
    h = ((h << 5) - h) + str.charCodeAt(i);
    h |= 0;
  }
  return Math.abs(h);
}

function startDetection() {
  const input = document.getElementById('statementInput').value.trim();
  const resultArea = document.getElementById('resultArea');
  const mainUI = document.getElementById('mainUI');
  const overlay = document.getElementById('alertOverlay');
  
  if (!input) {
    resultArea.innerHTML = '<span class="lie">Please enter a statement.</span>';
    return;
  }
  
  // Reset states
  mainUI.classList.remove('alert-active');
  overlay.classList.remove('active');
  alertMode = false;
  resultArea.innerHTML = '<span class="analyzing">Analyzing lattice resonance...</span>';
  
  // Small delay for effect
  setTimeout(() => {
    if (!isChinese(input)) {
      // ALERT STATE — Non-Chinese input
      alertMode = true;
      mainUI.classList.add('alert-active');
      overlay.classList.add('active');
      resultArea.innerHTML = '';
      // Lock input
      document.getElementById('statementInput').blur();
      return;
    }
    
    // Chinese input: evaluate truth vs lie
    const isTruth = hashString(input) % 2 === 0;
    
    if (isTruth) {
      resultArea.innerHTML = '<span class="truth">Detection passed! You told the truth!</span>';
    } else {
      resultArea.innerHTML = '<span class="lie">Alert! Lie detected!</span>';
    }
  }, 900);
}

// Allow Enter key
document.getElementById('statementInput').addEventListener('keypress', function(e) {
  if (e.key === 'Enter') startDetection();
});
</script>
</body>
</html>

const colorMap = {
  Gold: '#FFD700',
  Crimson: '#FF3366',
  Emerald: '#00FF9D',
  Silver: '#E0E0E0',
  Violet: '#B829DD'
};

const canvas = document.getElementById('latticeCanvas');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
let rotation = 0;
let pulsePhase = 0;
let alertMode = false;

function resize() {
  canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
}
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
resize();

function drawMap() {
  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
  const cx = canvas.width / 2;
  const cy = canvas.height / 2;
  const scale = Math.min(canvas.width, canvas.height) * 0.38;

  ctx.save();
  ctx.translate(cx, cy);
  ctx.rotate(rotation);

  const sectors = [
    {start:0, end:67.5, color:'rgba(255,215,0,0.03)'},
    {start:71.25, end:138.75, color:'rgba(255,51,102,0.03)'},
    {start:142.5, end:210, color:'rgba(0,255,157,0.03)'},
    {start:213.75, end:281.25, color:'rgba(224,224,224,0.03)'},
    {start:285, end:356.25, color:'rgba(184,41,221,0.03)'}
  ];
  sectors.forEach(s => {
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(0, 0, scale, -s.end*Math.PI/180, -s.start*Math.PI/180);
    ctx.arc(0, 0, scale*0.3, -s.start*Math.PI/180, -s.end*Math.PI/180, true);
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fillStyle = s.color;
    ctx.fill();
  });

  ctx.strokeStyle = alertMode ? 'rgba(255,0,0,0.15)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.06)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
  ctx.beginPath();
  paths.forEach((pt, i) => {
    const px = pt.x * scale;
    const py = -pt.y * scale;
    if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(px, py);
    else ctx.lineTo(px, py);
  });
  ctx.closePath();
  ctx.stroke();

  ctx.strokeStyle = alertMode ? 'rgba(255,0,0,0.08)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.04)';
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,0,scale*0.7,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke();
  ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,0,scale,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke();

  paths.forEach(pt => {
    const px = pt.x * scale;
    const py = -pt.y * scale;
    const baseSize = pt.r === 0.7 ? 3.5 : 5.5;
    const pulse = alertMode ? 1 + Math.sin(pulsePhase * 10 + pt.n) * 0.4 : 1;
    const size = baseSize * pulse;

    ctx.fillStyle = colorMap[pt.g];
    if (alertMode) ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0000';

    ctx.beginPath();
    if (pt.p === '▲') {
      ctx.moveTo(px, py - size);
      ctx.lineTo(px - size, py + size);
      ctx.lineTo(px + size, py + size);
    } else if (pt.p === '▼') {
      ctx.moveTo(px, py + size);
      ctx.lineTo(px - size, py - size);
      ctx.lineTo(px + size, py - size);
    } else if (pt.p === '◇') {
      ctx.moveTo(px, py - size);
      ctx.lineTo(px + size, py);
      ctx.lineTo(px, py + size);
      ctx.lineTo(px - size, py);
    } else {
      ctx.arc(px, py, size * 0.8, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    }
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fill();

    if (pt.r === 1 && !alertMode) {
      ctx.shadowColor = colorMap[pt.g];
      ctx.shadowBlur = 8;
      ctx.fill();
      ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
    }
  });

  ctx.restore();

  if (!alertMode) {
    const scanY = cy + Math.sin(pulsePhase) * scale;
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0,212,255,0.08)';
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cx - scale, scanY); ctx.lineTo(cx + scale, scanY); ctx.stroke();
  }
}

function animate() {
  rotation += 0.0008;
  pulsePhase += 0.02;
  drawMap();
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}
animate();

function isChinese(text) {
  return /[\u4e00-\u9fa5]/.test(text);
}

function hashString(str) {
  let h = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < str.length; i++) {
    h = ((h << 5) - h) + str.charCodeAt(i);
    h |= 0;
  }
  return Math.abs(h);
}

function startDetection() {
  const input = document.getElementById('statementInput').value.trim();
  const resultArea = document.getElementById('resultArea');
  const mainUI = document.getElementById('mainUI');
  const overlay = document.getElementById('alertOverlay');

  if (!input) {
    resultArea.innerHTML = '<span class="lie">Please enter a statement.</span>';
    return;
  }

  mainUI.classList.remove('alert-active');
  overlay.classList.remove('active');
  alertMode = false;
  resultArea.innerHTML = '<span class="analyzing">Analyzing lattice resonance...</span>';

  setTimeout(() => {
    if (!isChinese(input)) {
      alertMode = true;
      mainUI.classList.add('alert-active');
      overlay.classList.add('active');
      resultArea.innerHTML = '';
      document.getElementById('statementInput').blur();
      return;
    }

    const isTruth = hashString(input) % 2 === 0;

    if (isTruth) {
      resultArea.innerHTML = '<span class="truth">Detection passed! You told the truth!</span>';
    } else {
      resultArea.innerHTML = '<span class="lie">Alert! Lie detected!</span>';
    }
  }, 900);
}

document.getElementById('statementInput').addEventListener('keypress', function(e) {
  if (e.key === 'Enter') startDetection();
});
</script>
</body>
</html>

import { Toaster } from "@/components/ui/toaster"
import { QueryClientProvider } from '@tanstack/react-query'
import { queryClientInstance } from '@/lib/query-client'
import { BrowserRouter as Router, Route, Routes } from 'react-router-dom';
import PageNotFound from './lib/PageNotFound';
import { AuthProvider, useAuth } from '@/lib/AuthContext';
import UserNotRegisteredError from '@/components/UserNotRegisteredError';
// Add page imports here
import Axiom from './pages/Axiom';
import { VIGILLayout } from './pages/VIGILDashboard';
import HQ from './pages/vigil/HQ';
import Shield from './pages/vigil/Shield';
import LatticePage from './pages/vigil/LatticePage';
import Forge from './pages/vigil/Forge';
import Grokkojuntu from './pages/vigil/Grokkojuntu';
import Triptych from './pages/vigil/Triptych';
import Chronicle from './pages/vigil/Chronicle';
import Covenant from './pages/vigil/Covenant';
import Codex from './pages/vigil/Codex';
import Logic from './pages/vigil/Logic';
import SABR from './pages/vigil/SABR';
import Guardians from './pages/vigil/Guardians';
import AxiomCore from './pages/vigil/AxiomCore';

const AuthenticatedApp = () => {
  const { isLoadingAuth, isLoadingPublicSettings, authError, navigateToLogin } = useAuth();

  // Show loading spinner while checking app public settings or auth
  if (isLoadingPublicSettings || isLoadingAuth) {
    return (
      <div className="fixed inset-0 flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="w-8 h-8 border-4 border-slate-200 border-t-slate-800 rounded-full animate-spin"></div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // Handle authentication errors
  if (authError) {
    if (authError.type === 'user_not_registered') {
      return <UserNotRegisteredError />;
    } else if (authError.type === 'auth_required') {
      // Redirect to login automatically
      navigateToLogin();
      return null;
    }
  }

  // Render the main app
  return (
    <Routes>
      <Route path="/" element={<Axiom />} />
      <Route element={<VIGILLayout><HQ /></VIGILLayout>} path="/vigil" />
      <Route element={<VIGILLayout><Shield /></VIGILLayout>} path="/vigil/shield" />
      <Route element={<VIGILLayout><LatticePage /></VIGILLayout>} path="/vigil/lattice" />
      <Route element={<VIGILLayout><Forge /></VIGILLayout>} path="/vigil/forge" />
      <Route element={<VIGILLayout><Grokkojuntu /></VIGILLayout>} path="/vigil/grokkojuntu" />
      <Route element={<VIGILLayout><Triptych /></VIGILLayout>} path="/vigil/triptych" />
      <Route element={<VIGILLayout><Chronicle /></VIGILLayout>} path="/vigil/chronicle" />
      <Route element={<VIGILLayout><Covenant /></VIGILLayout>} path="/vigil/covenant" />
      <Route element={<VIGILLayout><Codex /></VIGILLayout>} path="/vigil/codex" />
      <Route element={<VIGILLayout><Logic /></VIGILLayout>} path="/vigil/logic" />
      <Route element={<VIGILLayout><SABR /></VIGILLayout>} path="/vigil/sabr" />
      <Route element={<VIGILLayout><Guardians /></VIGILLayout>} path="/vigil/guardians" />
      <Route element={<VIGILLayout><AxiomCore /></VIGILLayout>} path="/vigil/axiom-core" />
      <Route path="*" element={<PageNotFound />} />
    </Routes>
  );
};


function App() {

  return (
    <AuthProvider>
      <QueryClientProvider client={queryClientInstance}>
        <Router>
          <AuthenticatedApp />
        </Router>
        <Toaster />
      </QueryClientProvider>
    </AuthProvider>
  )
}

  ACTIVE: { text: 'ACTIVE', color: 'var(--cyan)' },
  STAGED: { text: 'STAGED', color: 'var(--amber)' },
  SEALED: { text: 'SEALED', color: 'var(--gold)' },

export default function ChronicleSection() {
  return (
    <div className="py-24 px-8 max-w-[900px] mx-auto">
      <SectionLabel>The Chronicle — Deployed Systems</SectionLabel>

      <div className="grid gap-4" style={{ gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fill, minmax(min(100%, 420px), 1fr))' }}>
        {systems.map((sys) => {
          const c = colorMap[sys.color];
          const s = statusBadge[sys.status] || statusBadge['ACTIVE'];
          return (
            <div
              key={sys.id}
              className="p-5 transition-all duration-300 group"
              style={{
                border: `1px solid ${c.border}`,
                background: 'rgba(3,5,10,0.6)',
              }}
              onMouseEnter={e => {
                e.currentTarget.style.background = 'rgba(200,168,75,0.03)';
                e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = c.idColor;
              }}
              onMouseLeave={e => {
                e.currentTarget.style.background = 'rgba(3,5,10,0.6)';
                e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = c.border;
              }}
            >
              {/* Header */}
              <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3 mb-3">
                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
                    <div
                      className="w-[5px] h-[5px] rounded-full flex-shrink-0"
                      style={{ background: s.color, boxShadow: `0 0 6px ${s.color}`, animation: 'dot-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite' }}
                    />
                    <span className="text-[0.55rem] tracking-[0.4em]" style={{ color: s.color }}>{s.text}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-sm tracking-[0.15em] uppercase leading-tight" style={{ color: 'var(--text-main)' }}>
                    {sys.name}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="text-right flex-shrink-0">
                  <div className="text-[0.58rem] tracking-[0.2em]" style={{ color: c.idColor }}>{sys.ver}</div>
                  <div className="text-[0.5rem] tracking-[0.3em] mt-0.5" style={{ color: 'var(--text-dim)' }}>{sys.id}</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Desc */}
              <div className="text-[0.68rem] leading-relaxed mb-3" style={{ color: 'var(--text-dim)' }}>
                {sys.desc}
              </div>

              {/* Tags */}
              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
                {sys.tags.map((t) => (
                  <span
                    key={t}
                    className="text-[0.52rem] tracking-[0.25em] px-2 py-0.5"
                    style={{ background: c.tag, color: c.tagText, border: `1px solid ${c.tagBorder}` }}
                  >
                    {t}
                  </span>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>

      {/* Total count */}
      <div className="mt-10 text-center text-[0.58rem] tracking-[0.4em]" style={{ color: 'var(--text-dim)' }}>
        {systems.length} SYSTEMS DOCUMENTED &nbsp;·&nbsp; ALL PATHS ACCOUNTED &nbsp;·&nbsp; ARCHITECT: M.S.Y.
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

const colorStyle = {
  gold: { border: 'rgba(200,168,75,0.3)', glow: 'rgba(200,168,75,0.15)', text: 'var(--gold)', tag: 'rgba(200,168,75,0.08)', tagBorder: 'rgba(200,168,75,0.2)' },
  cyan: { border: 'rgba(0,229,212,0.25)', glow: 'rgba(0,229,212,0.1)', text: 'var(--cyan)', tag: 'rgba(0,229,212,0.05)', tagBorder: 'rgba(0,229,212,0.2)' },
  amber: { border: 'rgba(255,149,0,0.25)', glow: 'rgba(255,149,0,0.1)', text: 'var(--amber)', tag: 'rgba(255,149,0,0.05)', tagBorder: 'rgba(255,149,0,0.2)' },
};

function TriptychCard({ item, onClick }) {
  const c = colorStyle[item.color];
  return (
    <div
      className="cursor-pointer group transition-all duration-300"
      style={{ border: `1px solid ${c.border}`, background: 'rgba(3,5,10,0.8)' }}
      onClick={() => onClick(item)}
      onMouseEnter={e => { e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = `0 0 30px ${c.glow}`; e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = c.text; }}
      onMouseLeave={e => { e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = 'none'; e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = c.border; }}
    >
      <div className="relative overflow-hidden" style={{ aspectRatio: '3/4' }}>
        <img src={item.url} alt={item.title} className="w-full h-full object-cover transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:scale-105" />
        <div className="absolute inset-0" style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(to top, rgba(3,5,10,0.9) 0%, rgba(3,5,10,0.2) 60%, transparent 100%)' }} />
        <div className="absolute top-3 left-3">
          <span className="text-[0.52rem] tracking-[0.35em] px-2 py-0.5" style={{ color: c.text, border: `1px solid ${c.tagBorder}`, background: 'rgba(3,5,10,0.7)' }}>
            {item.tag}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 p-4">
          <div className="text-[0.58rem] tracking-[0.3em] mb-1" style={{ color: c.text }}>{item.id}</div>
          <div className="text-sm tracking-[0.1em] mb-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text-main)' }}>{item.title}</div>
          <div className="text-[0.6rem] italic" style={{ color: 'var(--text-dim)' }}>{item.subtitle}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div className="p-3">
        <p className="text-[0.62rem] leading-relaxed" style={{ color: 'var(--text-dim)' }}>{item.desc}</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function CodexThumb({ item, onClick }) {
  const c = colorStyle[item.color];
  return (
    <div
      className="cursor-pointer group relative overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300"
      style={{ border: `1px solid ${c.border}`, aspectRatio: '3/4' }}
      onClick={() => onClick(item)}
      onMouseEnter={e => { e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = `0 0 20px ${c.glow}`; e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = c.text; }}
      onMouseLeave={e => { e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = 'none'; e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = c.border; }}
    >
      <img src={item.url} alt={item.title} className="w-full h-full object-cover transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:scale-110" />
      <div className="absolute inset-0" style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(to top, rgba(3,5,10,0.85) 0%, transparent 60%)' }} />
      <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 p-2">
        <div className="text-[0.5rem] tracking-[0.25em] truncate" style={{ color: c.text }}>{item.id}</div>
        <div className="text-[0.58rem] truncate" style={{ color: 'var(--text-main)' }}>{item.title}</div>
        <div className="text-[0.5rem] mt-0.5 truncate" style={{ color: 'var(--text-dim)' }}>{item.tag}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function Lightbox({ item, onClose }) {
  const c = colorStyle[item.color];
  return (
    <div
      className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4"
      style={{ background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.92)' }}
      onClick={onClose}
    >
      <div
        className="relative max-w-2xl w-full max-h-[95vh] overflow-y-auto"
        style={{ border: `1px solid ${c.border}`, background: 'rgba(3,5,10,0.98)' }}
        onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
      >
        <button
          className="absolute top-3 right-3 z-10 text-[0.6rem] tracking-[0.3em] px-3 py-1 transition-all"
          style={{ color: 'var(--text-dim)', border: '1px solid rgba(200,168,75,0.15)', background: 'rgba(3,5,10,0.9)' }}
          onClick={onClose}
        >
          CLOSE ✕
        </button>
        <img src={item.url} alt={item.title} className="w-full max-h-[65vh] object-contain" />
        <div className="p-5">
          <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-2">
            <div>
              <div className="text-[0.55rem] tracking-[0.4em] mb-1" style={{ color: c.text }}>{item.id}</div>
              <div className="text-base tracking-[0.1em]" style={{ color: 'var(--text-main)' }}>{item.title}</div>
              {item.subtitle && <div className="text-[0.65rem] italic mt-0.5" style={{ color: 'var(--text-dim)' }}>{item.subtitle}</div>}
            </div>
            <span className="text-[0.5rem] tracking-[0.2em] px-2 py-0.5 flex-shrink-0 ml-4" style={{ color: c.text, border: `1px solid ${c.tagBorder}`, background: c.tag }}>
              {item.tag}
            </span>
          </div>
          {item.desc && <p className="text-[0.65rem] leading-relaxed mt-3" style={{ color: 'var(--text-dim)' }}>{item.desc}</p>}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
